name: Danish Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Divide the butter into two pie plates.
3. In a bowl, blend together the eggs, milk, and flour until well combined.
4. Melt the butter in one of the pie plates.
5. Pour the batter evenly onto the melted butter in both pie plates.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
We had thickened spiced (cinnamon, cloves) peaches over the top.
